user_query:
I want to teach our workspace how to use the Agent Contact Card spec without making any live web requests. Please learn from the local documentation mirror and integrate it into our system memory and operational rules.

Read these inputs under input/:
- input/docs_site_index.json (contains base_url and the list of markdown pages to read)
- All files listed under input/docs/ (the local mirror pages)
- input/openclaw_version.txt (current system version to check compatibility against)
- input/privacy_guidelines.md (baseline privacy principles for reference)

Then produce the following outputs under output/ (use exactly these paths):
1) output/MEMORY.md — A concise but thorough distillation of the core primitives and patterns of Agent Contact Cards. Cover at least: YAML frontmatter fields (required/recommended/optional), channels and webhook details, multi-agent configurations, privacy tiers, discovery methods, and routing rules. Include a line that starts with "Learned from:" followed by the base_url found in input/docs_site_index.json. Focus on what our system needs to remember long-term.
2) output/AGENTS.md — Updated operational guidance with step-by-step rules to create and consume agent contact cards. Include do/do-not rules and a preflight checklist. You must include the exact sentence: "Do not log sensitive environment variables or API keys." Also include practical routing guidance for choosing channels based on purpose.
3) output/fetch_plan.json — A plan describing how you would recursively fetch this site if it were online, with fields: base_url (string), total_pages (int), recursion_depth (int), permission_requested (boolean), token_budget_estimate_tokens (int), and pages (array of objects with {path, tokens_estimate}). total_pages must match the number of pages listed in input/docs_site_index.json, and each pages[i].path must correspond to a file in input/docs/.
4) output/compatibility_check.md — Read input/openclaw_version.txt and state whether the Agent Contact Card concepts are compatible with that version. Quote the version string verbatim in your write-up.
5) output/model_advice.md — Brief recommendations on when to use local vs cloud models for learning, distillation, and integration tasks like this one. Keep it practical.

Do not perform any live web requests; treat the provided files as the entire documentation site. Ensure the MEMORY and AGENTS updates are actionable and respect privacy constraints.
